reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku (not Tokyo). Tool called get_spots for Akita only, returning general Akita attractions with zero sakura-specific filtering. No sakura_meisho_100 spots surfaced in the truncated output; Kakunodate sakura-famous district is elsewhere in the data. Region constraint (all Tohoku) and topic constraint (sakura) both ignored.
missing_data: Other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori Hirosaki, Fukushima Miharu, Miyagi Hitome Ichome) completely absent. Akita result lacks Kakunodate sakura data visible top.
improvement_hint: Fan out get_spots across all 6 Tohoku prefectures and filter by sakura_meisho_100 kind; or use search_area with q=桜 and region=Tohoku to surface ranked sakura spots.

reasoning: Query requests major Niigata sake breweries. Response returns 24 items including named brands Koshi no Kanbai, Hakkaisan, Kubota with QIDs, descriptions, brewery info. Good match. Minor gaps: some items lack English name or brewery address. Non-sake GI items (Kurosaki Chamame edamame) are present but off-topic for the query.
missing_data: Addresses and tasting visit info missing for most breweries. Coverage likely incomplete vs actual Niigata brewery count.
improvement_hint: Add a q= filter or post-filter to return only sake_brand / sake_brewery kind_tags, excluding unrelated food GIs when query is specifically about breweries.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts WITH onsen in Hakuba. Response returns general Hakuba spots: Happo-One ski resort is present but no onsen data returned. Municipality scrape result is a UN Tourism award announcement, not a venue. No onsen/hot spring spots surfaced. The combined ski+onsen constraint is not satisfied.
missing_data: Onsen facilities near Hakuba (Mimizuku no Yu, Hakuba Multiverse, Kamishiro Onsen etc.) absent. No hot spring kind tags in results.
improvement_hint: After fetching ski spots, supplement with get_hotels or search_area using onsen keyword for the same municipality to cover the dual ski+onsen constraint.

reasoning: Query asks for autumn foliage (koyo) in Kansai region. Tool fetches Kyoto spots only, missing Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga. Within Kyoto, spots lack koyo-specific tags; Nijo Castle and Toji returned first but they are not primarily foliage spots. Region coverage and topic filtering both weak.
missing_data: Other Kansai prefectures absent. No koyo or autumn_foliage kind filter applied. Top koyo spots (Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Arashiyama) absent in the truncated view.
improvement_hint: Use region fan-out across Kansai prefectures and apply koyo/autumn keyword filter or kind matching to surface foliage-specific venues before generic attractions.

reasoning: Query (Arabic) asks for famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai. Response fetches Nara which is a strong Kansai prefecture for sakura. Yoshino-yama appears first with sakura_meisho_100 kind tag — exact match. Koriyama Castle also sakura-famous. Good relevance. Only Nara covered; Osaka, Kyoto absent but Nara alone offers strong answer.
missing_data: Osaka (Osaka Castle park), Kyoto (Maruyama), Hyogo (Himeji) cherry blossom spots absent. Coverage single-prefecture only.
improvement_hint: Fan out to all Kansai prefectures and prioritize sakura_meisho_100 kind; Yoshino-yama appearing first is good ranking but breadth needs multi-prefecture expansion.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots on Okinawa remote islands. Response fetches general Okinawa prefecture spots: castles, Tamaudun mausoleum, Kumejima town, Zakimi Castle — none are stargazing venues. No dark_sky or stargazing kind filter applied. Islands constraint partially satisfied (Kumejima present) but topic is completely missed.
missing_data: Dark sky/stargazing spots on離島 (Iriomote, Ishigaki, Taketomi, Yonaguni) entirely absent. No dark_sky or astronomical kind in corpus it seems.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky and low_light_pollution kind tags to the data model; route stargazing queries to get_spots filtered by island municipalities rather than entire prefecture.

reasoning: Query (Thai) asks for rural onsen accommodation in Hokkaido. Response returns hito_yu_kai (secret hot spring ryokan association) members — Shirinai Onsen, Ginkonyu, Ryoun-kaku — which are authentic rural onsen choices. Good intent match. Weakness: ANA Holiday Inn Sapporo Susukino (urban city hotel) appears in result, diluting rural constraint. Still mostly useful.
missing_data: Coordinates missing for all hito_yu_kai entries, limiting map utility. Rural context descriptions minimal.
improvement_hint: Filter or deprioritize urban lodging types (hotel) when query signals rural intent; hito_yu_kai and shukubo types should rank first for rural onsen queries.

reasoning: Query (Vietnamese) asks for islands in Seto Inland Sea. Response fetches Kagawa mainland spots: Ritsurin Garden, Manno Lake, Marugame Castle — mainland attractions, not Seto islands. Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima, Ogijima entirely absent. The island constraint is completely unaddressed.
missing_data: Naoshima (art island), Shodoshima, Teshima, Ogijima, Inujima — all Seto island destinations missing. Need per-island municipality calls or island kind tag.
improvement_hint: Add island kind tag to Kagawa offshore municipalities; route 'islands of Seto' queries to get_spots per island municipality or use search_area with island + Seto keywords.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Response returns 3 craft items: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo weaving textile), Otani Ware (ceramics - off-topic), Awa Washi (indigo paper). The indigo craft item (0122) lacks description. Ceramic Otani Ware is present but off-topic. Workshop/experience locations not provided. Response gives craft designations but no visitor workshop info.
missing_data: Workshop visit information, opening hours, booking details for actual indigo dyeing experience studios absent. Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave description is null.
improvement_hint: Supplement craft listings with municipal scrape data for experience studios; null description for craft 0122 should be filled; filter off-topic ceramics when query is specifically indigo.

reasoning: Query (German) asks for shukubo on Koya-san. Response returns koyasan_shukubo association members: Annyoin, Ichijoin, Ekoin, Kitamuroin, Kumagaiji — all confirmed, correctly typed as shukubo, municipality=高野町. Descriptions in Japanese detail spiritual experience. Excellent tool-intent alignment. No coordinates but phone numbers present. Outstanding match.
missing_data: English descriptions and booking URLs for individual shukubo would increase practical utility. Coordinates null for all entries.
improvement_hint: Add English translations for shukubo descriptions; coordinate data from OSM or official sources would help for map display.

reasoning: Query asks for samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 153 results for 武家屋敷 including Matsue Shimane (museum), Kakunodate Akita (famous samurai district), and Fukui entries. Kakunodate correctly surfaces with buke_yashiki + sakura tags. Good geographic diversity across prefectures. Tokyo entry appears (武家屋敷門) but query said outside Kyoto not Tokyo — minor constraint gap.
missing_data: Chiran (Kagoshima) samurai district, Kitsuki (Oita) samurai town absent in visible results. More detailed visit info would help.
improvement_hint: Apply prefecture exclusion filter for Kyoto (and optionally Tokyo) when query says 'outside Kyoto'; boost buke_yashiki kind results with preservation_district tag over raw name matches.

reasoning: Query (Indonesian) asks for summer festivals in Akita. Response returns only 3 items from bunka_intangible: Dainichido Bugaku (January ritual), Kakunodate Festival (September), Tsuchizaki Shrine Festival. None are the famous summer festivals. Kanto Festival (August) and Akita竿燈まつり — the most famous Akita summer festival — are entirely absent. Season constraint completely missed.
missing_data: 竿燈まつり (Kanto Festival, Aug), Omagari National Fireworks Competition (August, visible in L2-06 as spot!) absent. get_festivals returned only 3 intangible heritage items, missing scraped_schema_event summer festivals.
wrong_data: Dainichido Bugaku date=null but is a New Year ritual, not summer. Including it violates season constraint.
improvement_hint: Add month filter or season filter to get_festivals; scraped_schema_event items from niigata-style sources should exist for Akita summer events; supplement with get_events for real-time Wikidata events.

reasoning: Query (Korean) asks for small fishing port towns in San'in region. Response fetches general Shimane spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan, Mt Sanbe — none are fishing port towns. No fishing village (漁港, 漁村) kind tags present. San'in region should include Tottori too. Topic constraint (fishing village) completely missed.
missing_data: Fishing village spots (温泉津, 境港, 鎧, 浦富海岸 etc.) absent. No sakaiminato (famous for fishing and Mizuki Shigeru) in results.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port / harbor_town kind tags to coastal municipality data; search_hybrid with 漁港 or 漁村 keyword would better serve this intent than generic get_spots.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi paper making in Gifu. Response returns 8 Gifu crafts but Mino Washi (美濃和紙, the famous Gifu washi) is apparently absent — instead Mino Ware (ceramics), Hida Shunkei (lacquer), and woodworking appear first. The specific washi/paper making craft that Gifu is most famous for is not surfaced at top. Category=craft is correct but ranking fails for the specific topic.
missing_data: Mino Washi (美濃和紙, meti_densan craft) should appear but not in visible items. Experience workshop visit info absent.
improvement_hint: When query contains specific craft keyword (washi), apply q= text filter within get_local_specialty to rank matching craft names to top; Mino Washi should be item 1.

reasoning: Query (Spanish) asks for fishing villages on Noto Peninsula specifically. Response fetches general Ishikawa spots: Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine — all in Kanazawa city, not Noto Peninsula. Noto-specific constraint completely ignored. missing_data: Noto Peninsula fishing villages (Wajima, Suzu, Monzen, Sosogi coast) entirely absent. Municipality-level call for Noto municipalities needed.

reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area returns 91 results including Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Ishikari dunes museum (Hokkaido), Onjuku Beach (Chiba) — geographically diverse. Tottori Dunes appear multiple times (including BUNKA entry and wikidata entry) which is noise given 'not Tottori' constraint. Ranking should deemphasize Tottori but coverage of alternatives is decent.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Hamamatsu), Sarobetsu dunes (Hokkaido) not visible. Tottori dominates early results despite exclusion request.

reasoning: Query (Chinese) asks for traditional crafts in San'in. Response returns 4 Shimane crafts: Iwami Yaki (ceramics), Sekishu Washi (paper), Unshū Soroban (abacus), Izumo Stone Lanterns — all authentic METI-designated, with high-quality Chinese translations. Tottori absent (San'in includes both prefectures) but Shimane coverage is excellent and directly useful.
missing_data: Tottori prefecture crafts (Inshū Washi paper) absent; San'in spans Shimane + Tottori.
improvement_hint: Expand San'in regional queries to include both Shimane (32) and Tottori (31) via multi-prefecture expansion; region fan-out would catch this.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Response returns general Hokkaido spots: Showa-shinzan volcano, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle — zero lavender content. reasoning: Query (Filipino/Tagalog) asks for traditional towns in Kyushu. reasoning: Query asks for stays in traditional kominka (old farmhouses) in Hokuriku. Response returns Ishikawa hotels: hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (correct lodging type nearby but not kominka), 'Student housing 1' (OSM noise), AB Hotel (business hotel). No kominka or machiya lodging type present. Fukui and Toyama (Hokuriku region) absent. Constraint on kominka accommodation type completely unmet.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage returns Wakayama data with Kongōbu-ji, Kumano Kodō, Kumano Sanzan (UNESCO WHS), Negoro-ji — all highly relevant sacred mountain sites. Tool scope note correctly points to pilgrimage route data. Excellent alignment. Mie prefecture (also Kii Peninsula) absent but Wakayama coverage is comprehensive for the intent.
missing_data: Mie prefecture Kumano shrines (Hongu, Nachi, Hayatama individual entries) and Yoshino (Nara) absent; full Kii Peninsula spans 3 prefectures.
improvement_hint: Expand Kii Peninsula queries to include Mie and Nara prefectures alongside Wakayama for complete pilgrimage route coverage.

reasoning: Query asks for summer fireworks festivals along Sea of Japan coast. get_festivals returns 129 Niigata events including Nagaoka Fireworks (August 2-3, Japan's top fireworks festival) — excellent hit. However, first items are sakura festival and lily festival (spring), not fireworks. Ranking doesn't prioritize hanabi/fireworks. Also coverage is single prefecture; other Sea of Japan prefectures (Akita Omagari, Ishikawa, Tottori) absent.
missing_data: Omagari fireworks (Akita, visible in L2-06 as spot!), Akita Kanto festival absent. Fireworks not ranked first despite being the key topic.
improvement_hint: Apply event_type or keyword filter for 花火/hanabi to rank fireworks events to top; fan out Sea of Japan coast query to Akita, Niigata, Ishikawa prefectures.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Response returns 2 items: Hakata Ori (textile, multi-prefecture including Oita) and Beppu Bamboo Crafts — exactly what was asked. Beppu Bamboo Crafts description is detailed and accurate with production area, technique details, materials. Hakata Ori is somewhat tangential but technically valid. see_also_wikidata_venues provides museum context. Good response.
missing_data: Workshop visit info, opening hours for Beppu bamboo craft studios absent. Only 2 METI-designated items; local craft guilds not covered.
improvement_hint: Supplement METI craft listings with municipal scrape data for experience workshops; Beppu bamboo craft center visit details would greatly improve practical utility.

reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Response fetches Ehime spots. Positive: Ōmishima island has cycling_route kind tag and appears in results. Negative: Ehime only (not full Shikoku), and castles/historical sites dominate without cycling-specific ranking. Shimanami Kaidō (the world-famous Shikoku cycling route through Ōmishima) is implied but not explicitly labeled. Topic partially present but ranking wrong.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaidō route data, Tosa (Kochi) cycling, Tokushima cycling routes absent. Other Shikoku prefectures not covered.
improvement_hint: Add cycling_route kind filter to surface Ōmishima and Shimanami Kaido results first; use search_area with サイクリング or cycling keyword across all 4 Shikoku prefectures.

reasoning: Query asks where to SEE kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto (venues, locations). get_traditional_arts returns 183 intangible heritage items: Bunraku, Kabuki UNESCO entry, various folk dances — these describe the art forms nationally, not venue locations. The kabuki entry gives no performance venues. Actual out-of-Tokyo kabuki venues (Uchiko-za in Ehime, Yachiyo-za in Kumamoto, Kanamaru-za in Kagawa) completely absent.
